summary: Phase 2.5-review-d (#260) reviewer login: dedicated runbook documents UI-only demo login as default App Review path, optional Supabase free-tier OTP with Site URL https://app-juli.com and redirect https://app-juli.com/**, credentials outside source control, and no real seller data. Existing LoginForm/loginAsReviewer implementation reused; 13 new contract tests pass with 55 phase-2.5 deploy tests green.

mappings.criterion: Supabase free-tier project configured if API OTP auth is used.
Supabase Site URL = https://app-juli.com; redirect URLs include https://app-juli.com/**.
Reviewer credentials/instructions stored outside source control.
UI-only path (NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1) acceptable if it satisfies App Review.
No real seller business data required.

recommendations: Operator must verify live https://app-juli.com/login shows demo entry after build-frontend-review.sh on the VPS.
Copy reviewer handoff template from reviewer-login-runbook.md to ops notes with operator contact.
